descriptionEn: Name means "oracle." He is the son of Elmodam or Elmadam, a Judahite, listed in Luke's genealogy of Jesus Christ.

verses.line: Which was the son of Melchi, which was the son of Addi, which was the son of Cosam, which was the son of Elmodam, which was the son of Er,

images.caption: Which was the son of Melchi, which was the son of Addi, which was the son of Cosam, which was the son of Elmodam, which was the son of Er, (Luke 3:28)
